CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2022 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Continued To Jan-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgement For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgement For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Continued To Dec-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for approval of compromise of claim or action or disposition of proceeds of judgment for minor or person with a disability.

Dept. 514; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:33:20 a.m. and concluding at 09:45:09 a.m.

Plaintiff Krisitn Ray appearing represented by Joseph Michael Breall and is placed under oath.
Defendant Dorothy Banks not appearing.

Plaintiff summarizes the facts of the case.
Court voire dires Plaintiff.

Petition for Approval of Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability is APPROVED as follows:

1. Principal Sum = $275,000.00 minus Attorney Fees = $110,000.00, Medical Expenses = $2,350.00, and Costs

TOTAL SETTLEMENT AMOUNT TO BE DIVIDED BETWEEN PETITIONER AND MINOR = $102,061.27
Minor's portion of $51,031.63 shall be deposited into blocked account at JP Morgan Chase, Charles Schwabb located at 211 Main Street, San Francisco, CA 94105.

Proposed orders signed.
Court orders matter continued to Dec-01-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for progress report on the deposit into blocked account.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2022 Off Calendar
